description_long: This is a taupe-colored fedora hat with a wide, flat brim and a gently pinched crown. The surface has a subtle ribbed texture, likely from woven straw or synthetic fibers, and displays a slight sheen under light. A thin, matching hatband encircles the base of the crown, tied into a small, neat bow on one side. The crown features a classic teardrop indentation at the top, giving it a distinguished and structured appearance. The brim is even and extends outward, providing ample shade. The overall design is elegant and understated, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings.
description: A taupe fedora hat with a wide, flat brim, pinched crown, and a thin hatband tied in a bow. The surface is subtly ribbed and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pinched crown, teardrop indentation, and the bow of the hatband on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, rounded profile of the crown and the continuous hatband without the bow visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and brim, with the hatband bow just visible on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the bow of the hatband clearly visible on the right, and the crown's gentle slope.
